{{Quote|Stinkin' ''Jedi''. Go on an' kill me. Go on an' kill ''everybody''.|Terrel Nakay|<ref name="Shatterpoint (novel)">[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']]</ref>}}
'''Terrel Nakay''' was a [[Balawai]] teenager who lived in [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
While fleeing a battle during the [[Summertime War]], Terrel Nakay, [[Keela Nakay|Keela]], [[Pell Nakay|Pell]], [[Urno]], and [[Nykl]] had an accident in a [[steamcrawler]], but [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] managed to save them. His father was killed by the [[Korun/Legends|Korunnai]] during the war. Terrel had a strong contempt for the Korunnai and the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. He befriended Master Windu thinking he was a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], but eventually discovered he was a Jedi. At a moment of fury, he attempted to kill [[Besh (Korun)|Besh]] and [[Liane Trevval]], stabbing them. Later, he faced [[Kar Vastor]], who considered that the boy deserved the death, because he had potential to kill. Master Windu tried to convince Vastor not to do it, but the ''[[lor pelek]]'' finally killed Terrel by slitting his throat with one of his [[vibroshield]]s.

==Appearances==
